'''Tuskettes''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|non-sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Tooth/Legends|tusked]] [[Mammal/Legends|mammals]] that lived feral on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Courkrus]]. Members of the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] species ate tuskettes raw as palate cleansers. On at least one occasion, the Hutt [[Shala]] forced a pair of tuskettes to fight each other to the [[Death/Legends|death]] for his entertainment.

==Description==
A [[Sentience/Legends|non-sentient]] [[Mammal/Legends|mammal]] [[Species/Legends|species]], tuskettes were small enough in size that a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] could bite off one's head. They possessed [[Tooth/Legends|tusks]], [[Blood/Legends|blood]], and a [[Bone/Legends|spine]] and were also capable of screaming.<ref name="I,J" />

==History==
In [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]],<ref name="I Jedi date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[I, Jedi]]'' to [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]].</ref> when the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] visited the Hutt [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Shala]]'s [[Shala's base|base]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Courkrus]] to gather information about the Hutt, he found two tuskettes fighting, unaware that one of them would be [[Death/Legends|eaten]]. As Horn watched, one of the animals emerged victorious, splattering tuskette blood on the Jedi's cheek, after which it screamed as Shala snapped its spine and bit off its head. The Hutt then offered a [[Foodstuff/Legends|raw haunch]] of the animal to Horn and, when Horn refused, threw it to his [[Gender/Legends|men]] to fight over, resulting in a [[Unidentified Rodian (Shala's base)|member]] of the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] species eating it. Horn later reflected that if he wished to, he could use [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to perform a census of all the feral tuskettes living in the planet's [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Vlarnya]].<ref name="I,J" /> In [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]],<ref name="Scourge date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of [[Scourge (novel)|''Scourge'']] to [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]].</ref> during a feast at the Hutt crime [[Lord/Legends|lord]] [[Popara Anjiliac Diresto]]'s [[Popara's penthouse|penthouse]] on the planet [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]], live tuskettes were kept in cages for the Hutt guests to eat as palate cleansers.<ref name="Sc">[[Scourge (novel)|''Scourge'']]</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Tuskettes first appeared in the [[1998]] novel ''[[I, Jedi]]'', written by [[Michael A. Stackpole]].<ref name="I,J" /> The creatures also appear in the [[2012]] novel [[Scourge (novel)|''Scourge'']], written by [[Jeff Grubb]].<ref name="Sc" /> The novel is a novelized version of the [[Wizards of the Coast]] ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' adventure ''[[Tempest Feud]]'',<ref name="Essential Reader's Companion">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> although the animals are not included in the original [[Roleplaying game|RPG]] material.<ref name="Tempest Feud">''[[Tempest Feud]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[I, Jedi]]'' {{Ab|I, Jedi (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
*[[Scourge (novel)|''Scourge'']]
